ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the department chairperson */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professors" (
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the professor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the professor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the professor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the professor */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the professor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_professor_id FOREIGN KEY ("professor_id") REFERENCES professors ("professor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the student withdrew from the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering for which grades are recorded */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Average GPA for the course */,
  "a_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving an 'A' */,
  "b_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving a 'B' */,
  "c_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving a 'C' */,
  "d_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving a 'D' */,
  "f_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving an 'F' */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "student_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment record associated with the grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES course_enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal record */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering with withdrawals */,
  "withdrawal_count" INTEGER /* Total number of withdrawals for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_sessions" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class session */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering for which the session is scheduled */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the class session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the class session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the class session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_sessions_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering being rated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the student on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which data is being recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA for the course for that year */,
  "total_withdrawals" INTEGER /* Total withdrawals for the course for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Professor, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (professor or peer) providing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
